title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Guest to Account not linked to any Tenant
scenario: Verify data correctness when moving from Guest to an Account not linked to any Tenant
steps: 1) Install the app and go as Guest. Check data in Poly Lens Menu > Support > App. Tap "Later" button.
2) Go to Poly Lens Menu > General > Account. Login with account NOT linked to any Tenant. Go to Poly Lens Menu > Support > App.
expected: Step 1: App version is correct; Tenant name, tenant id, user id are None; Last connected: unknown. Step 2: Account information displayed; Tenant name and tenant ID are not present on the card.
